text: The cool, structured atmosphere of this place wraps around me—first, a modern conference space glimpsed beyond glass with echoes of anticipation, then a bright, immersive wall urging me to reflect on research and development. Here, I feel a subtle tension between the curiosity that drives progress and the unsettling awareness of surveillance and expectation; it is both inspiring and quietly unsettling to exist in these spaces shaped by knowledge and the gaze of others.
